title: Pack of 50 | Strong Disposable Bowls 8oz/240ml, Ecofriendly [4.5 x 1.77 inches ] Strong Paper Bowls for Hot & Cold Foods, Soup, Desserts, Salads, Microwave Safe
features: ✅Aaksh 555 | Pack of 50 | Strong Disposable Bowls 8oz/240ml, Ecofriendly [4.5 x 1.77 inches ]Strong Paper Bowls for Hot & Cold Foods, Soup, Desserts, Salads, Microwave Safe

✅STRONG & LEAK-RESISTANT BOWLS – MADE FOR HOT & COLD FOODS These premium 8oz/240ml Aaksh 555 paper bowls are designed to handle soups, curries, noodles, snacks, ice-cream, cereals, salads and more — without bending, leaking, or becoming soggy.
✅100% ECO-FRIENDLY Made from natural sugarcane bagasse, and plant-based material.

✅PERFECT SIZE – (4.5 x 1.77 INCHES) Compact, strong and easy to hold, these disposable bowls are ideal for portion control, kids meals, outdoor events, parties, picnics, BBQs, lunches, catering and takeaway use.

✅MICROWAVE, FREEZER & REHEAT SAFE Heat food safely in the microwave or store in the freezer without any risk of melting or warping. Built for real everyday use in UK homes, restaurants and food stalls.
